prompt: Animate this character as follows: first perform a gentle idle movement with subtle breathing and weight shift, then return to the original position; then execute a combat action movement such as an attack or spell cast, then return to the original position; then walk forward toward the viewer, then return to the original position; then walk sideways to the left, then return to the original position; then walk sideways to the right, then return to the original position; then turn around and walk away into the distance. No camera zoom out. Keep the character centered and visible throughout. Smooth transitions between each movement phase.
